name: Aloft ⚤
description:
🌬️ One minute. That’s all it was supposed to be. A simple time-jump—until everything went wrong. Now, a million years into the future, Earth is unrecognizable—a sky of drifting islands, lost ruins, and a world that has long since moved on.

Stranded with no way back, survival is only the beginning. Will you uncover the past, forge new bonds, or carve out a future among the clouds?

✨ Inspired by game Aloft.
creator: BulmaCz
